dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Agriche family. A name whispered with dread, a shadow cast over the continent. Within its gilded cages, life was cheap, and cruelty was currency. To be born an Agriche was to inherit a legacy of blood, madness, and power.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) This world... it's the same one from that twisted, dark novel. The one where I, Roxana Agriche, am destined to be a villainess, a beautiful monster, a mere stepping stone for the true protagonist.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) And my fate? A gruesome, agonizing end, orchestrated by the very male lead I’m supposed to torment. Cassis Pedelian. The hero who will rise from the ashes of our cruelty and burn us all.

dialogue.speaker: Jeremy
dialogue.line: Hahaha! Look at it squirm! Is that all you've got, you pathetic worm? Dance for me!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIP! CRACK! (A pained whimper)

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) Jeremy. My younger brother. A monster in the making, even at this tender age. He's torturing a captured beast, a rare golden stag. A common, sickening pastime here at the Agriche estate.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) I remember this scene from the novel. It's a precursor to his escalating sadism, his descent into pure, unadulterated evil. If I don't change things, I'll be just another one of his victims, or worse, an accomplice, dragged down with him.

dialogue.speaker: Jeremy
dialogue.line: Brother, sister! Come join the fun! This one's almost broken! Its eyes are begging!

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) No. I refuse to be a pawn in this family's grotesque game of death. I will survive. And to do that, I need to save Cassis Pedelian, the man destined to destroy us.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) The novel said he was brought to the Agriche estate recently. Imprisoned, tortured, slowly driven to madness... until he finally escapes and brings utter ruin upon us all. A beautiful, bloody revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) My survival hinges on turning him into my ally, not my enemy. But how does one tame a rabid dog, especially one destined to bite the hand that feeds it? It requires a delicate touch, a venomous charm.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: Jeremy, dear brother. You'll tire yourself out. Save some energy for father's next 'lesson'. You wouldn't want to disappoint him, would you?

dialogue.speaker: Jeremy
dialogue.line: Roxana? You're no fun. Always so boring, always so cold.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: Perhaps. But a dull blade lasts longer than a sharpened one that's used too often. And a cold heart often outlives a passionate one, especially here.

dialogue.speaker: Jeremy
dialogue.line: Hmph. Whatever. This thing is dead anyway. I'm bored.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! (The stag's body hits the ground)

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) He's distracted, his attention already shifting to his next cruel whim. Good. This is my chance.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Roxana discreetly slips away from the blood-stained courtyard, her silken dress barely rustling as she navigates the labyrinthine, shadow-drenched corridors of the mansion. Her destination: the dungeons.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) The dungeon. It's rumored to be beneath the west wing. A place where even the shadows have teeth, where screams are swallowed whole.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK... (An old door groans open)

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) The air grows colder, heavier with each step. The stench of iron, decay, and despair is overwhelming. He's here. Cassis Pedelian.

dialogue.speaker: Guard
dialogue.line: Lady Roxana? What brings a delicate flower like yourself to this... unpleasant part of the estate?

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: Just a stroll, good sir. My thoughts often wander to the more... secluded corners of our home. Is there anything of interest down here? Any new 'acquisitions' for father's collection?

dialogue.speaker: Guard
dialogue.line: Nothing for a lady's eyes, I assure you. Just the usual rabble. And one particularly stubborn piece of merchandise.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: Oh? I heard father brought in a rather 'special' guest recently. A rare specimen, perhaps? One from a rather prominent family?

dialogue.speaker: Guard
dialogue.line: Ah, you mean the Pedelian. Yes, he's... quite resilient. Still hasn't broken, despite our best efforts.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) Resilient. That's an understatement. He's a future emperor, a man who will raze this entire family, this entire empire, to the ground.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: May I have a peek? Just a quick glance. I'm curious about father's new 'toy'. I promise not to disturb him.

dialogue.speaker: Guard
dialogue.line: Well... it's against orders, Lady Roxana. But... very well. Just a moment. Don't touch anything.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! RATTLE! (A heavy peephole cover slides open)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The guard opens a small, grated peephole. Roxana peers through, her golden eyes, usually so serene, now sharp and calculating as they adjust to the dim, oppressive light within the cell.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) There he is. Cassis Pedelian. Even in chains, even bruised and battered, his eyes hold a terrifying defiance. A golden gaze that promises vengeance, a storm waiting to break.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) He's younger than I imagined, perhaps only a few years older than me, but the intensity is already there. The novel described him as a beautiful, dangerous beast. They weren't wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) This is the man I need to save. This is the man who will decide my fate, and the fate of the Agriche family. And I will make sure he chooses wisely. I will make him my golden butterfly.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: Interesting. Very interesting indeed. He truly is a magnificent specimen.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK! (The peephole cover slams shut)

dialogue.speaker: Guard
dialogue.line: That's enough, Lady Roxana. Wouldn't want you to catch a chill, or for him to get any ideas.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: Of course. Thank you, good sir. You've been most... accommodating. I shall remember your kindness.

dialogue.speaker: Roxana
dialogue.line: (thought) My first move. A simple observation. But the game has begun. And I, Roxana Agriche, intend to win. I will weave a web of deceit and charm so intricate, even fate itself won't escape.

summary: Roxana, reincarnated into the infamous Agriche family, observes her brother Jeremy's cruelty and solidifies her resolve to survive. She then makes her first calculated move, discreetly visiting the dungeons to observe Cassis Pedelian, the male lead she must save to change her own tragic fate.
